scripts.install:all: cd backend && cargo fetch && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd backend && cargo build --release && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.clean: cd backend && cargo clean && cd ../frontend && rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json && rm -rf backend/data
scripts.health: curl -s http://localhost:8080/health | jq . 2>/dev/null || echo 'Backend not responding'
scripts.test: cd backend && cargo test && cd ../frontend && npm test
scripts.format: cd backend && cargo fmt && cd ../frontend && npm run format
scripts.lint: cd backend && cargo clippy && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
